commands: yarn run openapi-generator-cli generate --git-repo-id=daytona --git-user-id=daytonaio -i dist/apps/api/openapi.json -g java --additional-properties=groupId=io.daytona,artifactId=daytona-api-client,apiPackage=io.daytona.api.client.api,modelPackage=io.daytona.api.client.model,invokerPackage=io.daytona.api.client,library=okhttp-gson,java8=true,hideGenerationTimestamp=true,useRuntimeException=true -o {projectRoot}/src
